data.title: Tanger Honored with Nareit’s 2026 Leader in the Light Award for Transparency
data.description: Tanger, a retail destination owner/operator based in Greensboro, North Carolina, recently received the 2026 Leader in the Light Award for Transparency from Nareit. This recognition highlights Tanger's commitment to transparency in governance.

data.title: Millrose Properties Amends Credit Agreement, Expanding to a $1.835 Billon Unsecured Facility With the Addition of a $500 Million Term Loan Commitment
data.description: Miami-based Millrose Properties, Inc. (NYSE: MRP) revealed today that it has finalized an adjustment to its credit agreement with JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. acting as the administrative agent. This includes the addition of a $500 million term loan, boosting the overall floating rate unsecured debt capacity within the facility to $1.835 billion. The updated unsecured facility, which supersedes the prior secured revolving credit facility, solidifies Millrose's position as a top homesite option platform for residential homebuilders.

data.title: Bandwidth Partners with New Agentforce Contact Center
data.description: A leading global cloud communications software company, Bandwidth Inc. (NASDAQ: BAND), has collaborated to provide the infrastructure for Salesforce's latest CRM-native, AI-powered contact center platform. This partnership was announced in Raleigh, North Carolina on March 27, 2026.

data.title: HONOR2U Redefines Safety and Equity with "Honor 2 Her" Initiative for Women in Public Service
data.description: On March 27, 2026, in Miami, the HONOR2U company launched a new initiative called H2HER (Honor 2 Her), aiming to enhance public safety gear to better cater to women in law enforcement, firefighting, and emergency services. This program is part of the company's efforts to address the unique requirements, safety concerns, and dignity of women in these fields.

data.title: Ruger Appoints New Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Mayodan, North Carolina - Sturm, Ruger & Company, Inc. (NYSE: RGR) has appointed Andrew Wieland as the new Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer as part of a planned transition from Tom Dineen. In his new role, Mr. Wieland will oversee all financial functions such as forecasting, corporate budgeting, financial reporting, and assessing potential investment prospects. This appointment is crucial for Ruger's strategic financial management as they move forward in their long-term plans.

data.title: Cyabra Announces Completion of Business Combination with Trailblazer Merger Corp.
data.description: Cyabra's common stock is set to commence trading on the Nasdaq exchange on March 27, 2026. Investors can find it under the ticker symbol "CYAB" from that date.

data.title: Novo Nordisk Wins FDA Nod For First-Ever Weekly Basal Insulin​
data.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has approved Novo Nordisk A/S' Awiqli (insulin icodec-abae) as the first once-weekly basal insulin for adults with Type 2 diabetes. This approval is significant as it offers a shift in diabetes care by potentially easing the daily injection burden while still maintaining glycemic control. Awiqli is to be used alongside diet and exercise to enhance blood sugar levels in adults with Type 2 diabetes. This new treatment introduces a once-weekly dosing schedule, providing an alternative to the conventional daily basal insulin therapies. The approval of Awiqli is considered an important advancement in diabetes care, offering a novel option for adult patients with Type 2 diabetes.

data.title: Swedish Defence Materiel Administration (FMV) Places Follow-On Order for Additional Teledyne GAVIA AUV Systems
data.description: Teledyne Gavia, a prominent provider of modular autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) systems under Teledyne Marine, has disclosed that the Swedish Defence Materiel Administration (FMV) recently made a subsequent request for more GAVIA Autonomous Underwater Vehicles alongside payload modules. This follows a prior delivery of GAVIA systems to the Swedish Armed Forces in 2025. The deal was formalized during the Navy Tech Conference held in Gothenburg, Sweden.

data.title: Cloud for Good Acquires EMS Consulting, Expanding Salesforce Expertise and Impact to the Financial Services Sector
data.description: Today, in Asheville, North Carolina, Cloud for Good, a prominent Salesforce consulting partner specializing in higher education, nonprofit, and government sectors, disclosed its acquisition of EMS Consulting, a company known for its expertise in Salesforce solutions. The acquisition signifies a strategic move towards expanding their services and offerings.

data.title: medicube Announces and Debuts Largest U.S. Consumer Activation at Coachella 2026
data.description: In its most extensive cultural initiative to date, medicube is establishing itself as a key player in the realms of music, beauty, and groundbreaking ideas. The event, held in Los Angeles on March 27, 2026, heralded the global skincare brand's reputation for advanced clinical technology and cutting-edge beauty solutions.

data.title: Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. Q1 2026 Results and Investor Call Notification
data.description: Luxembourg-based Ardagh Metal Packaging S.A. is set to hold its Q1 2026 earnings call on April 23, 2026. The company will release its financial results on the same day at midday BST (07:00 EDT) on their official website for investors to access. Stay tuned for the latest updates on their financial performance.

data.title: Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. VI Announces Pricing of $220 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: On March 27, 2026, in Miami Beach, FL, Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. VI announced the pricing of its initial public offering of 22,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. These units, to be listed on The Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol "IPFXU," consist of one Class A ordinary share and one-third of one redeemable warrant. Each full warrant allows the holder to purchase one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share. After the units trade separately, the Class A ordinary shares and warrants are anticipated to be listed on Nasdaq under the symbols "IPFX" and "IPFXW," respectively.
